clean_output:
This is a modern, minimalist living room with a clean and sophisticated aesthetic. The room is characterized by a neutral color palette, with light gray walls, a warm wooden floor, and a bold accent of a vibrant yellow armchair.

The central focus is a bright yellow armchair with a modern design, featuring a plush, cushioned seat and back, and slender, dark-colored legs. It is positioned in the center of the room, facing the viewer. To the left of the chair stands a tall, slender floor lamp with a gold-colored, minimalist base and a straight, adjustable arm that extends upwards to illuminate the space.
